hero.title: Our Team
hero.subtitle: Meet the experts behind DataLead's success.

section.title: Data Experts
section.subtitle: Certified professionals with deep experience across enterprise data technologies.

m1.name: CEO & Founder
m1.bio: 18+ years of experience in enterprise data management. Founded DataLead with a mission to bring world-class database consulting to Azerbaijan.

m2.name: CTO
m2.bio: Expert in modern data platforms and cloud architecture. Leads the technical vision and IOMETE partnership integration.

m3.name: Lead DBA
m3.bio: 15+ years managing mission-critical databases for government and banking. Specialized in Oracle RAC and PostgreSQL HA clusters.

m4.name: Data Engineer
m4.bio: Designs and builds scalable ETL/ELT pipelines and data lake architectures. Expert in Apache Spark and dbt.

m5.name: Solutions Architect
m5.bio: Bridges business requirements with technical solutions. Specializes in DWH design and data platform migrations.

m6.name: Security Specialist
m6.bio: Ensures data protection and compliance across all client environments. Expert in DataSunrise and encryption technologies.
